rules.logic: BIOC(ESXi SSH Logon Burst — Single Source → Many Hypervisors) AND BIOC(vim-cmd Mass Power-Off Across ESXi Cluster) AND BIOC(Mass File Creation Adjacent to VMDK Files) within 15m
rules.name: Ransomware — ESXi Mass Encryption Sequence

rules.logic: CR-CRED-0003 (LSASS + DCSync) AND CR-EXFIL-0001 (rclone exfil) AND CR-RANSOM-0001 (ESXi mass encrypt) within 7d on related identities/hosts — auto-promotes to P1 incident.
rules.name: Ransomware — Full Kill Chain (Identity → Exfil → ESXi Encrypt)
